violations.text: The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the bar area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of beach and quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay bar sink and sanitizer spray. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar and kitchen areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have the original delivery plastic. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

The following was observed in poor repair: -ceiling tile in the men's bathroom (previous water damage) -light bulb under kitchen hood (to on) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
